septic-system.leach-field-text: Specialist in the aeration and defragmentation of the soil by an innovative technology in the restoration of septic fields.  Our technoclogy is : economic, efficient, respectful of the environment and unique.
septic-system.problem-text: Your septic system does not seem to work properly anymore Sewage water on the surface of the grass; often and especially during washings The water of the toilet goes up or down very slowly 'gargoyle' in the bathroom sink
problem-list: Following heavy rain or snow melt the ground remains spongy (like a sponge)
The water level in the septic tank is higher than normal sometimes overflowed by the lids
When emptying the septic tank there is water backing up from the septic field
The ground is soaked so much that you can not mow the lawn
septic-system.solution-text: Kelly La Solution Inc. owns the restoration technique to solve many soil problems including compaction and saturation of septic field. To rejuvenate quickly years can be added to yousystem without destroying your landscaping.
septic-system.how-it-works-text: Kelly La Solution Inc. will first locate the field then insert a 3 cm probe into the ground using a pneumatic hammer at a depth between 1 to 2 meters depending on the depth of the pipes in the field. Using a high-pressure compressor, the air is injected as a shot of dynamite which at the same time decolour the stone under the pipes and the earth walls, on each side of the field. The surface of the ground will move about 3 meters in diameter without damaging the ground. The air goes into all the cracks of the earth which will produce a vertical and horizontal passage to water and air. This solution is repeated every 1.5m according to the soil condition.
septic-system.prefilter-text: Pre-filters prevent clogging in the septic field.  IMPORTANT regular maintenance or cleaning should be done regularly.
septic-system.prefilter-text-under-pic: The prefilter improves the quality of the effluent from the septic tank. Suspended solids and grease are retained by the prefilter, which delays clogging and increases its life. Depending on the daily flow, it's possible to use more than one prefilter in the same installation. We offer the cleaning service according to YOUR needs: every month, 3 months, 6 months, 12 months etc ...
septic-system.excavation-subtitle: Mini-Excavation- To avoid digging the lids we install liner risers (chimneys)
excavation-list: Obstruction in the pipes = pressure cleaning
Roots, tree nearby = we dig, replace pipe, cut the roots ...
Diagnose the problem (bad drainage, breakage ...) = camera
Pipe crushed or damaged = replace the pipes
Cracked or damaged cover = we replace it
septic-system.location-text: Whether if you need a permit for the installation of a swimming pool, a project to expand your property, the construction of a garage, a shed ... we can help you and your project can be realized quickly. Keep in mind taht the first thing your city, town, village ... will ask you in order to process your request for a permit is to provide them the location of your septic system. No matter the age of the system we are able to locate the septic system.

q1.question: How can I locate my septic system for a pool permit?
q1.answer: We use a pipe detector to locate your drain field, allowing you to proceed with your permit application.

q2.question: Do you cover my area?
q2.answer: We offer our services throughout Quebec. Based in Vaudreuil-Dorion with a branch in Quebec City, we've worked from Gaspésie to Baie-James.

q3.question: What services do you offer?
q3.answer: Soil aeration, repairs, excavation, installation, mini-camera inspection, raising, pre-filter, pumping and French drain cleaning. We are THE reference except for emptying and soil testing.

q4.question: When is the best time for work?
q4.answer: We are closed from mid-December to mid-April. Contact us as soon as possible to get on our waiting list.

q5.question: My system is clogged, what should I do?
q5.answer: We specialize in solving drainage problems through air injection to restore your drain field to optimal performance.

q6.question: How long does a repair take?
q6.answer: On average 4 to 8 hours. Most repairs are completed the same day.

q7.question: Will the ground be damaged?
q7.answer: Holes of 3 cm in diameter every 3 square feet will appear on the surface, but will disappear within a few days.

q8.question: Is it harmful to the environment?
q8.answer: Not at all! Our aeration technique simply allows your drain field to function as originally designed.

q9.question: How do I check if my system has a problem?
q9.answer: Check the water level in the septic tank (should be below the pipe), look for paper blockages, and inspect your field for surface water.

q10.question: Can I connect my water softener to the system?
q10.answer: No. This creates deposits in the septic tank and generates excessive water surplus.
